title: Limbdi Heat Wave
lead: Limbdi is experiencing a severe heat wave with a Z-Score of +4.11. This event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Limbdi has resulted in extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Days (CDD) value of 13.4 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 63%, and wind speed is 15.3 km/h, exacerbating the heat. 
 The Heat Wave has significant implications for the city's infrastructure and daily life.
conclusion: Implement immediate measures to mitigate the effects of the heat wave.
